_publications._publicationTitle: Stepwise crosstalk between aberrant Nf1, Tp53 and Rb signalling pathways induces gliomagenesis in zebrafish.

_contextSnippet: the survival rates of rb1;tp53 cKO and nf1;tp53 cKO fish (72% and 47%) were lower than nf1 KO fish (87%) at 6 months
details: 47% survival rate at 6 months, lower than nf1 KO fish (87%)
